description: Default Nightbane psionic rules (Nightbane RPG pp. 67–68). O.C.C. rows may override via supernaturalRuleOverrides.

leyLine.notes: Range and duration +50% within 2 miles (3.2 km) of a ley line; doubled within 1 mile (1.6 km) of a nexus. Damage from psionic energy attacks doubles at a nexus (not from ley lines alone).

meditation.notes: One hour of meditation restores 6 I.S.P. and counts as two hours of sleep. Sleep or total relaxation restores 2 I.S.P. per hour. Meditation costs no I.S.P.

psychicApm.notes: Psionic attacks per melee equal physical hand-to-hand attacks per melee (see Psychic Combat).
